description: فحص الخوادم (المنافذ المفتوحة) والنوافذ الطرفية العاملة حالياً
command_preview: Write-Output '=== Listening Ports (Servers) ===' ; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess, @{Name='ProcessName';Expression={(Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).ProcessName}} | Sort-Object LocalPort | Format-Table -AutoSize | Out-String -Width 200 ; Write-Output '=== Terminal/Console Windows ===' ; Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.MainWindowTitle -ne '' -and ($_.ProcessName -match 'cmd|powershell|pwsh|WindowsTerminal|C
